reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. The validation is clearly missing (confirmed by TODO at L134), and dataColumnSidecarsByRoot correctly implements the check at L18-23. However, the impact is limited to resource waste on individual responding nodes, not network-wide disruption. An attacker can trigger this via P2P network by sending DataColumnSidecarsByRangeRequest with startSlot from epochs before max(current_epoch - 4096, FULU_FORK_EPOCH), causing the node to waste resources. Severity downgraded from Medium to Low as impact doesn't meet the >5% network threshold for Medium.
